positive: Minimalist, bold silhouette design of a soaring golden eagle against a deep indigo celestial background. The eagle is depicted in a powerful, upward-sweeping dive, rendered with clean, sharp linework and high contrast. Incorporate subtle geometric tribal patterns subtly integrated into the wings and tail feathers to give depth. Style should be graphic, vector art inspired, with negative space playing a crucial role in composition. Use a limited color palette: rich gold, deep indigo, and creamy white accents. Central composition, suitable for a t-shirt print. Cinematic lighting, perfect symmetry, high detail, 8k.
